description_long: This is a standard 12-ounce Coca-Cola can, featuring a cylindrical aluminum body with a slightly tapered top and bottom. The can is predominantly red with the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo wrapping around the sides, and a large 'Coke' text on one face. The surface is smooth and metallic, with a glossy finish that reflects light. The top of the can is silver with a pull-tab opening mechanism, typical of carbonated beverage cans. Fine print, a barcode, and nutritional information are visible on the back. The can appears undamaged and is a common sight in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, and public spaces.
description: A red and silver Coca-Cola can with white branding, smooth metallic surface, and a pull-tab top. The can is glossy, cylindrical, and features detailed labeling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large white Coca-Cola script logo on a red background, with the silver top and bottom edges visible.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the barcode, nutritional information, and fine print, with the Coca-Cola logo partially visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the bold white 'Coke' text on the red background, with minimal additional labeling.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the Coca-Cola script partially wrapped around the can, emphasizing the curved design.
attribute_label_or_branding: White Coca-Cola script logo, 'Coke' text, barcode, nutritional information, and fine print on a red background; all branding is in white and wraps around the can.
